questions.question: Describe the primary objective of a database management system (DBMS) in an organization. (5 marks)
questions.hint: What are the benefits of using a DBMS?

questions.question: What are the key characteristics of the database approach in software design? (5 marks)
questions.hint: List the key features of the database approach

questions.question: Compare and contrast the history of database applications before and after the advent of DBMS. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the impact of DBMS on database applications
